content:
Kate's decided to opt out of parenting Ava. I get it. I'm not mad, sad or disappointed. I get it. There have been many times I wanted to do the same. Ava even asked for this. 
I think it's a mistake that Ava chose this. She's going to have a hard time with just me and Kasia doing the parenting. I know I'm not as empathetic or careful about my words or creative with my thinking. It's going to be a whole lot of "you figure it out". Which is what she wants (and IMO needs at this age) but it's going to suuuuuuck. 

I hope Kate can survive this. It goes against her values completely. But the space will be good for her. I hope. As long as she sees it and treats it like that. Arrgh. She's going to feel like a failure. She's not. Idk what to do in these situations man... Like fuck. 

In the end it wasn't Ava either. It's her not feeling like I would back her up. Something I need to work on. Masking they call it. Eh. I'm solutioning again...

I feel stressed. Numb. Hot and cold. My neck is so strained. I don't need to solve anything right now
